product_overview: A web platform for browsing, creating, and conducting one-on-one competitions with instant matchmaking and real-time notifications. Users can discover competitions on the homepage and join live rooms when matches are accepted.
core_goals: Allow users to discover and inspect offline and live competitions from the homepage
Enable immediate matchmaking flows that let creators invite online competitors and transition competitions through pending → accepted → live → completed
Deliver all requests, invitations, and platform notifications in real time via Server-Sent Events so users can accept/decline inline without page reloads
Automatically clean up stale competitions and handle disconnections/heartbeats to prevent double-booking and zombie states

features.name: View Competitions
features.description: Browse active and offline competitions from the homepage, inspect details, and identify competitions that are live or available to join.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through competition cards -> Click to see details -> See competition details including status and participants
Navigate to / -> Scroll through competition cards -> GET /api/competitions fails -> See an error or empty state prompting retry

features.name: Instant Matchmaking & Competition Lifecycle
features.description: Create immediate competitions, invite available competitors, accept/decline invitations in real time, transition competitions to live when both sides stream, and conclude competitions to clear busy states.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Create an immediate competition -> See list of online competitors -> Send an invitation to a selected competitor -> Competitor receives an SSE notification -> Competitor accepts the invitation -> Creator receives acceptance via SSE -> Both navigate to /live -> Both start streaming -> System marks competition as live and sets users as busy -> A user ends the stream -> System marks competition as completed and clears busy flags

Navigate to / -> Create an immediate competition -> Send an invitation -> Competitor declines or ignores the invitation -> Invitation expires -> Creator sees invitation cancelled and pending competition removed or returned to available state

features.name: SSE Real-time Notifications & Inline Actions
features.description: Subscribe to Server-Sent Events on all pages so invitations, messages, and platform notifications arrive live and can be acted on inline without refreshing or navigating away.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> SSE connection is established -> Receive an invitation notification inline -> Interact with the notification to accept -> See the acceptance applied immediately across the UI without a page reload

Navigate to / -> SSE connection is lost or disrupted -> Receive delayed or duplicated notifications when reconnecting -> See an inline error or reconnection state prompting the user to retry or refresh

features.name: View Competitions
features.description: View and browse competitions on the homepage
